items.title: Golden path adoption initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving developer portal and service catalog, golden path templates, and developer experience and workflow telemetry so mainstream product teams can onboard to the platform without bespoke setup work.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease onboarding time by replacing manual bootstrap work with self-service templates and catalog workflows.
Increase the number of platform actions teams can complete without intervention.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase adoption by making the standard path visibly easier than bespoke setup.
Decrease onboarding support demand by making the workflow clearer and more measurable.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of routine platform workflows engineers can complete without asking for help.
Improve daily confidence in templates, docs, and self-service workflow quality.

businessKPIs.kpi: Platform support load per active team
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce recurring support demand by removing common onboarding and discovery confusion.

productBricks.change: Extended the portal with ownership views, onboarding actions, and better service discovery.
Expanded golden path coverage for the most common service types and migration starting points.
Introduced onboarding and self-service telemetry to measure friction and drop-off.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced onboarding and service-catalog improvements in Developer Portal.
Introduced self-service workflow actions in Platform Self-Service API.
Introduced local scaffolding and diagnostics support in Developer Platform CLI.

items.title: runtime self-service and delivery initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving environment provisioning and ephemeral environments, delivery pipelines and release automation, and runtime connectivity and integration patterns so teams can ship through a standard runtime foundation with fewer local workarounds.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time from repo creation to first production deployment
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease time to first production deployment through reusable environment and pipeline defaults.
Reduce local pipeline maintenance by consolidating common delivery patterns.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve lead time by reducing delivery setup variance across teams.
Decrease wait time by making runtime creation self-service and policy-aware.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time from repo creation to first production deployment
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease everyday setup and release time for engineers using the standard runtime and delivery path.
Reduce waiting and unblock day-to-day test and preview workflows.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve delivery flow by replacing local workarounds with reusable runtime and release patterns.

productBricks.change: Extended provisioning workflows with policy-backed preview and shared environment patterns.
Extended the reusable pipeline library for deploy, promote, rollback, and release evidence.
Published supported connectivity patterns for service dependencies and shared platform integrations.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced runtime provisioning improvements in Runtime Provisioning API.
Introduced reusable release workflows in the CI/CD Pipeline Library.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Ephemeral environment economics and adoption discovery

items.title: platform controls by default initiative
items.description: Initiative focused on improving identity, secrets and access guardrails, policy as code and compliance controls, artifact supply chain and base images, observability and telemetry foundation, and reliability workflows and incident automation so the standard path is also the safest and most operable path.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase control coverage by embedding identity, policy, and artifact standards in the normal delivery path.

customerKPIs.kpi: Incident MTTR for common platform failure classes
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Decrease MTTR through shared telemetry and automation.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce failure caused by inconsistent controls, weak baselines, and unclear rollback paths.
Reduce review overhead by shifting common controls into code and workflow automation.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve engineers' ability to satisfy normal control requirements without leaving the supported workflow.
Increase trust that policy and artifact checks are understandable and actionable instead of opaque blockers.

businessKPIs.kpi: Platform support load per active team
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce exception-related help demand by productizing the most common control interactions.

productBricks.change: Extended workload identity and secret-delivery defaults across the platform estate.
Extended policy checks and exception workflows in pipelines and runtime provisioning.
Extended trusted base-image and artifact provenance workflows.
Extended standard telemetry and alerting bundles for platform-adopting services.
Extended incident routing, runbooks, and remediation automation.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced identity, policy, and artifact workflow improvements in Policy and Identity Control API.
Introduced platform-control posture views in Security and Compliance Posture Dashboard.
Introduced incident and observability improvements in Platform Operations Dashboard.
Introduced enriched automation events in Incident and Telemetry Event Streams.
